blocks.text: The provider runtime owns the boundary between a provider CLI process and Riido's canonical event system.

items: Start a provider process from an already-approved runtime assignment input.
Manage provider session shape, stdin/stdout/stderr, parser, and raw event envelope.
Normalize raw provider output into provider event drafts for the supervisor.

blocks.text: The runtime must not decide business policy, mutate canonical IR directly, or infer UI semantics from Figma/client screens.
